name: chocolate cake
description: Indulge in a luxurious slice of chocolate cake, perfectly baked with a tender crumb and layered with smooth, velvety chocolate frosting.

name: chocolate cake parfait
description: A decadent chocolate cake parfait featuring tender cake layers, luscious chocolate cream, and light whipped topping perfectly layered for a luxurious treat.

name: beef and sausage sharwama
description: A hearty shawarma featuring tender grilled beef and seasoned sausage, wrapped in warm flatbread with crisp vegetables and signature sauces perfectly balanced and satisfying.

name: beef sausage roll
description: A delicious beef sausage roll featuring tender, flavorful beef encased in crisp, buttery pastry an irresistible snack for any time of day.

name: chicken and sausage shawarma
description: A delicious shawarma featuring juicy grilled chicken and seasoned sausage, wrapped in warm flatbread with crisp vegetables and signature sauces perfectly balanced and satisfying.

name: chicken and suya sharwama
description: Tender chicken and spicy suya meat wrapped in soft flatbread with fresh veggies and creamy sauce bursting with flavor in every bite.

name: chocolate banana bread
description: Moist banana bread infused with rich chocolate, creating the perfect balance of sweet banana and decadent chocolate in every bite.

name: chocolate chunk banana bread
description: A delightful chocolate chunk banana bread, baked with ripe bananas and generous pieces of chocolate tender, indulgent, and irresistible.

name: deluxe pancake
description: A luxurious stack of golden pancakes, layered with fresh fruits, syrup, and cream perfectly crafted for a deluxe breakfast or dessert treat.

name: healthy banana bread (No Sugar)
description: Moist, flavorful banana bread made with wholesome ingredients—naturally sweet and perfect for a guilt-free treat.

name: juicy chicken sharwama (creamy)
description: Tender, juicy chicken wrapped in soft flatbread with fresh veggies and a drizzle of creamy sauce bursting with flavor in every bite.

name: lemon cake
description: A soft, moist slice of lemon cake with a zesty citrus flavor and sweet, tangy frosting refreshing and delicious.

name: lemon cake parfait
description: A sophisticated lemon cake parfait with tender cake layers, smooth cream, and a hint of tangy lemon zest light, refreshing, and indulgent.

name: meat pie
description: A golden, flaky pastry filled with savory, seasoned meat perfectly baked and ready to enjoy hot.

name: milky cake
description: A soft and creamy milk cake, rich in flavor and melt-in-your-mouth sweet classic and comforting.

name: milky cake parfait
description: A luxurious milky cake parfait featuring tender cake layers, rich creamy filling, and light whipped topping elegantly layered for a decadent treat.

name: mini banana bread
description: Moist and flavorful mini banana bread, baked to golden perfection sweet, soft, and perfect for any time of the day.

name: nutella pancake
description: Indulge in a perfectly cooked pancake generously layered with smooth Nutella, creating a decadent treat in every bite.

name: pancake regular
description: Delicate, warm pancake with a tender crumb, cooked to golden perfection simple, classic, and satisfying.

name: premium deluxe pancake
description: Fluffy mini pancakes, golden-brown and perfectly soft ideal for a sweet snack or breakfast treat.

name: red velvet
description: A moist and velvety red velvet cake slice topped with creamy, smooth frosting rich, sweet, and utterly irresistible.

name: red velvet parfait
description: All the magic of red velvet in one cup layers of love, cream, and cake 😋

name: regular sharwama
description: (Without Sausage) Tender, flavorful meat wrapped in soft flatbread with fresh veggies and a drizzle of creamy sauce classic shawarma done right.

name: sausage roll (regular)
description: Crispy, buttery pastry enveloping a savory sausage filling, baked to perfection for a satisfying snack anytime.

name: vanilla cake parfait
description: All the goodness of vanilla cake, now in a cup! Creamy, dreamy, and oh-so-delicious 😋

name: vanilla cake slice
description: A moist and fluffy slice of classic vanilla cake, layered with creamy frosting and bursting with sweet, comforting flavor.

name: yoghurt drink
description: A smooth and refreshing yogurt drink made with creamy yogurt, lightly sweetened for a rich and satisfying taste.

name: yoghurt parfait
description: A wholesome yogurt parfait made with creamy yogurt, fresh seasonal fruits, and crunchy granola rich in flavor, light, and satisfying.

name: yoghurt parfait (fully loaded)
description: Layers of creamy yogurt, fresh fruits, and crunchy granola simple, fresh, and delicious 😋

name: zobo drink
description: A refreshing homemade zobo drink brewed from hibiscus leaves, lightly spiced and naturally sweetened for a bold, tangy taste.

name: Regular banana bread
description: Moist and flavorful banana bread, baked with ripe bananas for a naturally sweet and comforting treat.

name: Glazed Puff Puff
description: Puff puff perfection soft, sweet, and totally irresistible 😋

name: Premium Cupcakes
description: A delightful cupcake made with rich batter and finished with smooth, velvety frosting perfect for any celebration or treat.

name: Banana Bread Slice
description: A soft, moist slice of freshly baked perfectly sweet and satisfying.

name: Bento cake
description: Freshly baked bento cakes available in different flavors and designs. Prices vary based on design and flavor. Cake Customization — Flavour: chocolate, vanilla,velvet,red velvet • Color: yellow, red, gold
